result.summary: Found 3 visible issues: a major overlay obscuring content, a likely missing/blank header button label, and tiny unreadable legal text at the bottom.

issues.description: The semi-transparent "SCROLL DOWN" banner is covering the legal disclaimer text at the bottom of the offer section, making that content hard to read.
issues.suggestion: Move the scroll prompt lower or remove it once the page is fully loaded, and ensure it does not overlap important copy.

issues.description: The gold rounded button in the top-right header appears blank, with no visible label or icon.
issues.suggestion: Verify the button content is loading correctly and add the intended text or icon so the control is identifiable.

issues.description: The fine-print disclaimer text at the bottom is extremely small and difficult to read.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size and/or contrast, or place the legal copy in a clearer, dedicated section.
